creator: bordjukov@gmail.com
text:
The MiniUPnP project has released MiniUPnPd version 1.6 in July 2011. Currently the version in the ports tree is 1.5,1.

Release announcement:
July 2011 : release of MiniUPnPc-1.6 and MiniUPnPd-1.6. A lot of work on IPv6 support and IGDv2. Support of lease duration, etc.
